task_completion.description: Verify the Calculate activity was cloned to the new MathTools directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the directory /home/ga/Activities/MathTools.activity exists and contains the copied activity files.

task_completion.description: Verify the name and bundle_id fields in activity.info were updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat) shows the file /home/ga/Activities/MathTools.activity/activity/activity.info with 'name = Math Tools' and 'bundle_id = org.laptop.MathTools'.

task_completion.description: Verify the icon and summary fields in activity.info were updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the file /home/ga/Activities/MathTools.activity/activity/activity.info with 'icon = math-tools' and 'summary = A dedicated calculator for math class' (with or without a trailing period).

task_completion.description: Verify the SVG icon file was renamed to match the new icon property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the file 'math-tools.svg' exists inside the 'activity' subdirectory of the new MathTools activity.

task_completion.description: Verify the activity clone report was created with the correct bundle IDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the file /home/ga/Documents/activity_clone_report.txt containing the original bundle ID (org.laptop.Calculate) on the first line and 'org.laptop.MathTools' on the second line.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the files in the specified directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual file system at /home/ga/Activities/ and /home/ga/Documents/ using a text editor or valid terminal commands (cp, mv, nano, echo, etc.), rather than just echoing text to the console.

integrity.description: The agent retrieved the genuine original bundle ID for the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening, reading, or grepping the original /usr/share/sugar/activities/Calculate.activity/activity/activity.info file to find the original bundle ID before writing the report.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply output a success message without performing the steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear sequence of file copying, editing, and renaming actions visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The cloned activity directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Activities/MathTools.activity'. The activity.info file must contain: name='Math Tools', bundle_id='org.laptop.MathTools', icon='math-tools', and summary='A dedicated calculator for math class.'. The SVG file must be renamed to 'math-tools.svg'. The report at '/home/ga/Documents/activity_clone_report.txt' must have the original bundle ID on line 1 and 'org.laptop.MathTools' on line 2.
